text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I've no clue why, but my head's been killing me
lately.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Is it because I've been cramming slang words too
hard?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, I always end up overthinking how to use new
words when I learn them. Using all that big brain
energy's prolly causing my headache.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if it'll get better if I stop using slang and
start talking more like a mature adult instead.
Maybe I can try copying Maruzen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Actually, never mind... Maruzen's way of speaking
is really out there too sometimes...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I mean, what does "this is the pits" even mean?
Agh... My head!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer continues to suffer from her
headache for some time.
